title: Azhaikiran Madhavan Lyrics Raghavendrar
stanzas:
Azhaikiran madhavan
aanirai meithavan
manimudiyum
mayil iragum
edhir varavum
thudhi purindhen
maadhavaa keshavaa
sridhara OM.

Thaedinen dheva dhevaa
thamarai paadhame
vaadinen vasudhevaa
vandhadhu neramae.

gnyana vaasal naadinen
vedha gaanam paadinen
kaalam kaalam naan unai
Thaedinen dheva dhevaa
thamarai paadhame

kadhil naan kaetadhu
venu gaanaamirudham
kannil naan kandadhu
kannan birunthavanam

maayane naeyane
maasillaadha thooyane
aathma nyanam adaindha pinnum
Thaedinen dheva dhevaa
thamarai paadhame

Ragavendhra sri ragavendhra
Ragavendhra sri ragavendhra
Ragavendhra Ragavendhra
Ragavendhra  Ragavendhra
guruve saranam(2)

Gynana thirumaeni
kaana varavendumae
seetha poo vanna
padham thola vendumae

bakthan varum podhu
padhai thadaiyaanathe
kaattu peru vellam
aatril uruvaanadhe

thaayaaga dhayai seiyyum
dhevaa
thadai neenga arul
seiyya vaa vaa

naan seitha paavam
yaar theerkka koodum
nee vazhum idam vandhu
naan sera vendum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Azhaikiran Madhavan?

The song conveys deep devotion and reverence, celebrating the divine qualities of Madhavan.

In which movie is Azhaikiran Madhavan featured?

The song is from the movie Sri Raghavendrar.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the legendary voices of KJ Yesudas and Malaysia Vasudevan.

Who composed the music for Azhaikiran Madhavan?

The music was composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja.

When was Azhaikiran Madhavan released?

The song was released in 1985.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Azhaikiran Madhavan, the lyrics express a heartfelt devotion to the divine, encapsulating the essence of spiritual longing and reverence. The soothing melody, paired with the rich vocals of KJ Yesudas and Malaysia Vasudevan, creates an atmosphere of tranquility and peace. This song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and devotion, making it a timeless classic. It resonates deeply with listeners, evoking feelings of nostalgia and spiritual connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Azhaikiran Madhavan is a mesmerizing devotional melody that resonates with the soul, showcasing the unparalleled vocal prowess of KJ Yesudas and Malaysia Vasudevan. This enchanting song, composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, captures the essence of divine love and reverence. Experience the soothing vibes and spiritual depth of this classic track that transcends time and space.
stanzaMeanings: I understand the praise of Madhavan, who is a great one, and the peacock that shines with a gem-like beauty, and I offer my respects to him, Keshava, Sridhara, OM.
I sought the divine, O God, I sang the song of the lotus feet, and I realized the truth that has come to me.
I have sung the Vedic song at the entrance of knowledge, and I have sought you, O God, I have sung the song of the lotus feet.
I asked for the song of the flute, and I saw in my eyes the one who is the great Lord.
O illusion, O soul, pure and unblemished, I have sought the divine, I have sung the song of the lotus feet.
I take refuge in the guru (4)
Ragavendhra, O Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, O Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, O guru, I take refuge (2)
Will the divine grace come to see the sacred form? Will the flower-like feet be revealed?
When the devotee comes, do not block the path; let the great flood take shape in the stream.
O God, who shows compassion like a mother, please grant your grace, come, come.
Who can save me from the sins I have committed? I must come to the place where you reside.
I take refuge in the guru (4)
Ragavendhra, O Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, O Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, O guru, I take refuge (2)
Ragavendhra, O Ragavendhra, Raghava, Ragavendhra, O Ragavendhra, Raghava, O guru, Ragavendhra, O guru, Ragavendhra, O guru, Ragavendhra, O Ragavendhra, Raghava.
O guru, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, Raghava, O guru, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra, Ragavendhra.
